codeReview.summary: This feature added comprehensive test coverage for VAL-P2P-008 through VAL-P2P-011 across three test files (RawMaterialPurchasesPage, PurchaseReturnsPage, SettlementsPage). The implementation was already correct in the pages; the worker's task was to add verification tests. All 16 new test cases accurately verify the expected behaviors: GRN eligibility filtering (non-INVOICED only), GRN-line parity on preload, payable state visibility (outstanding amount and journal entry reference), return quantity capping with clear error messages, post-return list refresh, and outstanding-only allocation for supplier payment and settlement flows. Tests use proper mocking patterns, waitFor assertions for async behavior, and handle edge cases like duplicate text occurrences gracefully.

sharedStateObservations.observation: The frontend-workflow-worker skill instructs to 'write failing tests first, then implement'. In this case, the page implementations were already correct and only tests were needed. The worker documented this appropriately in skillFeedback.suggestedChanges noting 'the tests are the deliverable for this feature'. This is a valid workflow variation when verifying existing code.
sharedStateObservations.evidence: Handoff skillFeedback.followedProcedure = true, skillFeedback.suggestedChanges acknowledges the deviation from the normal test-first pattern was justified.

summary: PASS: The worker added 16 well-structured test cases across RawMaterialPurchasesPage.test.tsx, PurchaseReturnsPage.test.tsx, and SettlementsPage.test.tsx to verify VAL-P2P-008 through VAL-P2P-011. Tests accurately reflect page behavior for GRN eligibility filtering, line parity, payable visibility, return quantity caps, and outstanding-only allocation. All 1288 tests pass with clean lint and typecheck. No blocking issues found. The skill's test-first approach was appropriately adapted since the implementation already existed.
